updateNote: Day 60 Late PM PT refresh — Iran offers to reopen Hormuz, defer nuclear talks; Rubio REJECTS: 'must prevent nuclear sprint'; Trump 'unhappy' with proposal. UN Guterres warns Hormuz blockade risks global food emergency: 'Let ships pass. No tolls. No discrimination.' Brent surges to $110.44 (+38.3%). WTI $97.32. Gas ~$4.06 AAA. 2nd Hezbollah drone attack wounds IDF soldiers in buffer zone. German Chancellor Merz: US 'being humiliated' by Iran — deepest transatlantic rift. Senate defeated War Powers for 5th time. Veterans anti-war protest — 62 arrested on Capitol Hill. Pezeshkian: 'will not negotiate under pressure.' Hezbollah's Qassem rejects direct talks, sets 5 conditions. IEA: 'largest energy supply disruption in history.' Goldman Q4 Brent at $90. Hormuz Day 57 effectively closed. War Powers May 1 — 3 days.
